message.content: Kickoff for Nimbus rollout Phase 1. Let's capture planning and discovery tasks only.

Phase 1: Planning & Discovery

- Stakeholder map and RACI (Owner: Alex, Due: 2026-04-03)
- Requirement confirmation workshop (Owner: PMO, Due: 2026-04-04)
- Risk register draft (Owner: Nina, Due: 2026-04-05)
- Architecture review (Owner: Leo, Due: 2026-04-06)
- Comms plan v1 (Owner: Comms, Due: 2026-04-07)
Phase 1 looks solid. We'll revisit Phase 2 next week for pilot details.
